articles.title: Microsoft Begins Layoffs at Zenimax
articles.description: Redundancies have started at Zenimax, affecting studios like Bethesda and Arkane. Microsoft is restructuring its gaming division.
articles.impact: This could impact future game releases.

articles.title: Marvel Rivals Launches Free-to-Play Shooter
articles.description: Marvel Rivals invites players to ignite the battle in its new team-based shooter. The game is now available for free.
articles.impact: This could attract a large player base.

articles.title: Snap's AR Glasses Launch Causes Stock Drop
articles.description: Snap's new AR glasses launch has negatively impacted its stock performance. The company faces ongoing financial challenges.
articles.impact: Investors are concerned about Snap's future.

articles.title: PS5 Ports for Call of Duty: Black Ops Confirmed
articles.description: Treyarch confirms PS5 ports for Call of Duty: Black Ops and Black Ops 2, set to launch in July.
articles.impact: This will boost interest in classic titles.

articles.title: Apple's Second-Gen iPhone Air Coming in 2027
articles.description: Apple is preparing a second-generation iPhone Air for spring 2027 to enhance its appeal. Prototypes are currently in development.
articles.impact: This could revitalize Apple's smartphone lineup.

articles.title: Google Photos Expands AI Editing Feature
articles.description: Google Photos is rolling out its AI-powered 'Edit with Ask Photos' feature to five new countries, enhancing user experience.
articles.impact: This improves accessibility for global users.

articles.title: Mega Staraptor Dominates Pokémon Champions
articles.description: The latest update in Pokémon Champions makes Mega Staraptor a formidable opponent. Players are excited about its new abilities.

articles.title: Motorola Razr 70 Ultra Review Highlights
articles.description: The Motorola Razr 70 Ultra features a familiar design but increases battery capacity to 5,000 mAh. It's now under review.
articles.impact: This may attract loyal Razr fans.

articles.title: Yakuza Creator's Game Loses Director Amid Funding Issues
articles.description: Daisuke Sato, formerly of Nagoshi Studio, reports losing the director of his new game due to funding cuts from NetEase.
articles.impact: This raises concerns about project viability.

articles.title: Xbox's Strategy Criticized by Former Sony Boss
articles.description: Shawn Layden critiques Xbox's recent decisions, suggesting a fundamental misunderstanding of the gaming industry.
articles.impact: This could affect Xbox's market position.

articles.title: Unreal Engine 5 Update Boosts Nintendo Switch 2
articles.description: Epic Games announces a major Unreal Engine 5 update, enhancing performance on Nintendo Switch 2 significantly.

articles.title: Upcoming Xbox Layoffs Expected to Be Severe
articles.description: Reports indicate significant layoffs at Xbox, affecting multiple studios. Details are still emerging.
articles.impact: This could impact Xbox's development teams.

articles.title: Google Home Speaker Finally Available for Preorder
articles.description: The $100 Google Home Speaker, powered by Gemini, is now available for preorder after a long wait.
key_points: Google Home Speaker available for preorder
articles.impact: This could boost Google's smart home market.

articles.title: Valve Steam Machine Shows Impressive Performance
articles.description: New benchmarks reveal Valve's Steam Machine performs comparably to a Ryzen 5 5600X, indicating strong potential if priced right.
articles.impact: This could reshape Valve's hardware strategy.

articles.title: Destiny 2 Introduces Endless Grind for Collectors
articles.description: Despite its decline, Destiny 2 offers players a new reason to engage with the game through collectible grinding.
articles.impact: This could retain some player interest.
